name: Apple Butter Bars
recipeInstructions: Mix all ingredients except apple butter until crumbly. Spread half of the mixture in a 9 x 13 greased pan. Spread apple butter over the crumbly mixture. Cover with the remaining crumb mixture. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes. May be served with whipped cream. Note: This would also be good with different types of jams and powdered sugar sprinkled on top.
